text:
procedure is recorded in PRCDR_CD_1. The corresponding date is PRCDR_CD_DT_1, and 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_1 is the coding system/nomenclature used to identify the procedure. The principal 
procedure is performed for definitive treatment rather than for diagnostic or exploratory purposes. It 
is closely related to either the principal diagnosis or to complications that arise during other 
treatments. 

SHORT NAME: 
PRCDR_CD_1 PRCDR_CD_4 
PRCDR_CD_2 PRCDR_CD_5 
PRCDR_CD_3 PRCDR_CD_6 

LONG NAME:
